description: render a perfectly-aligned fixed-width light-box step receipt: reads body rows from BODY_FILE (one row per line) and emits the boxed ┌──title──┐ / │ row │ / └──┘ receipt used by the deploy flow's per-step output contract
rules: pure formatter — reads BODY_FILE (or an empty body when unset) and writes the rendered box to box.txt; no side effects
geometry is fixed: WIDTH columns wide (default 128); body rows longer than WIDTH-4 are truncated with '…' so the right border never breaks
TITLE is required and is centered in the top border; empty body lines render as empty box rows
deterministic given the same TITLE + BODY_FILE + WIDTH
usage: Set TITLE (the box header). Optionally set BODY_FILE (path to a file whose lines become box rows) and WIDTH (default 128). Output: box.txt (the rendered fixed-width box) under record_store.
limitation: Body content beyond WIDTH-4 chars per line is truncated with an ellipsis; the helper deliberately refuses to wrap so a step receipt stays single-line-per-row.
